_comment: Catalog for tools/generate_streets.gd. All City Kit Roads pieces are pre-centered 1x1 footprint tiles sitting flush at y=0 (verified via tools/measure_road_kit.gd - no offsets needed, unlike furniture_catalog.json). scale here is CITY_SCALE (world meters per tile), applied uniformly.

road_crossroad._comment: road-intersection-path, NOT road-crossroad - the crossroad pieces are a separate/wider highway-style piece, road-intersection is the correct city-street 4-way junction (same 1x1 footprint as road-straight, verified)
